Panel.Title: Nexus Notes
Panel.NoNotes: No notes yet. Click + to create one.
Panel.NoPartyNotes: No party notes from other players.
Panel.NoGM: Your vault needs to be set up by the GM. Ask them to log in and open Nexus Notes, then try again.

NoteEditor.Title: Title
NoteEditor.TagsHint: Comma-separated. Used for search and filtering.
NoteEditor.PinnedHint: Pinned notes appear at the top of your list.

Confirm.DeleteContent: Are you sure you want to delete this note? This cannot be undone.

GmTransparency.Name: GM Transparency
GmTransparency.Hint: When enabled, the GM can read all private notes from every player's vault. When disabled, the GM only sees their own vault and notes marked Party.

DefaultVisibility.Name: Default Note Visibility
DefaultVisibility.Hint: The visibility level pre-selected when creating a new note.
